tweet_text: 🚨 Good news! Republic of Ireland's Sammie Szmodics is out of the hospital and 'on the mend' after being knocked unconscious in a collision during Thursday's World Cup play-off against the Czech Republic. 🙏⚽ #GetWellSoon #FootballRecovery
article_title: Szmodics out of hospital and 'on the mend' after collision

tweet_text: Tottenham's woes deepen as their top managerial target turns them down amid a turbulent season. The club faces uncertainty with potential changes in both the boardroom and dugout! ⚽️😱 #THFC #ManagerSearch
article_title: Tottenham woes continue as top target turns them down during manager search
